category_sources: Official Poetry docs describe Poetry as a tool for dependency management and packaging in Python.
source_facts.description says Python package management tool.
display_name_sources: Official site and docs use Poetry as the project name.
docs_sources: Official Poetry site has a dedicated /docs documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official Poetry docs GitHub link and official GitHub organization repository python-poetry/poetry.
tags_sources: Official docs describe dependency management, packaging, lockfiles, project environments, and CLI commands.
